ValidationRule.description: 提交补签时，补签时间及补签原因必填
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Status__c) == '已提交补签申请', OR( ISBLANK( Reson__c ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CheckOutSupplementary' , ISBLANK( Supplementary_SignOut_Time__c)), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CheckInSupplementary' , ISBLANK( Supplementary_SignIn_Time__c )) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 提交补签时，补签时间及补签原因必填
